'''''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 3''' was the third of three issues in the [[Star Wars: Starfighter: Crossbones|''Starfighter: Crossbones'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] tie-in to the [[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Starfighter'']] [[Star Wars video games|video game]].

==Publisher's summary==
''In the conclusion of the three-part series, mercenary alien Nym confronts the murderous villain Sol Sixxa in an epic ship-to-ship battle on the oceans of Maramere. High-seas action, Star Wars-style, culminates in a fight to the death. But when the Trade Federation arrives, will either pirate survive?''

==Plot summary==
[[Sol Sixxa]] waited on the [[Revenant (Mere)|Revenant]] for [[Nym/Legends|Nym]] to confront him. As the crew prepare the ship one of his subordinates assess the weather and the reputation Nym has with the advice to proceed caution. Sol then beheads the subordinate proclaiming that Nym is not a "murderer". Just then Nym{{'s}} [[Cutter (ship)|Cutter]], the ''[[Sunrunner]]'' was spotted. Sol then orders the crew to activate the prototype [[Cloaking device/Legends|Cloaking device]].

On the ''Sunrunner'' [[Jinkins]] was outfitting Nym{{'s}} [[Cyborg/Legends|Cyborg]] arm with a [[Hand cannon]]. As the project was completed the [[Refugee/Legends|Refugee]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] had finished directing them to the [[Haunted Straits]] where his ship was attacked. [[Loreli Ro]] relayed the legends about the Straits, including the [[Invisible Island]]. Nym concludes that this is where his raids have been staged. Meanwhile the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] forces lead by [[Harro Ruuk]] order a [[Squadron/Legends|Squadron]] of [[Ostracoda-class gunboat|''Ostracoda''-class gunboats]] to reacquire the prototype without drawing the attention of the [[Trade Federation Directorate|Trade Federation Executive Board]].

As the ship was halfway through the straits, Nym knew Sol was about to attack and his theory was correct as he sent a team of Mere to kill the crew, minus Loreli. However, Nym countered by calling a [[Code Green]], which caused [[Jannik (Rodian)|Jannik's]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Reeven Clan|Clan]] to spring up to attack. Sixxa then countered by sending in [[Wavespeeder|speeders]], which Nym then countered by unveiling his [[Turret/Legends|turret]] armed and powered by his [[Bomblet generator/Legends|Bomblet generator]] and manned by Jinkins. With his forces getting decimated, Sixxa called a retreat while slicing off Nym{{'s}} hand cannon, and stabbing Jannik through him. Nym, realising what they stole, jumps onto the ''Revenant'' with [[Kole]] and the Rodians following suit.

Nym then tackles Sol Sixxa and the two plung into the [[Ocean/Legends|Ocean]], still fighting and Nym wins by uppercutting him and swims for shore. Kole then deactivates the cloaking device but as soon as Jinkins gets visual he notices that the Trade Federation has arrived. Nym then washes ashore on the Island but is attacked by Sol who feels like he knows too much, but is overpowered by Nym. Just then they realised that the Trade Federation has taken over both boats and they decide to call a truce, and Nym forms a plan.

Back on the ''Revenant'' a [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] reports to Harro that they have secured the ship but is then ambushed by Sol Sixxa, who fights the [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|Battle Droids]]. As Jinkins is watching the situation unfold and is struggling with his choices, Nym shows up and tells Jinkins to overload the bomblet generator and get Jannik and himself to the [[Escape pod/Legends|life pod]], while he accelerates the ship and collides with it as Kole, recognising this grabs Loreli and jumps ship. As both ships sink Loreli brings Nym to the surface and he "assures" her that Sixxa is dead.

However, three weeks later, Nym in his [[Havoc (starfighter)|''Havoc'']] lands on the Invisable Island, which Jinkins learns that because of the [[Stygium/Legends|Stygium]] [[Crystal/Legends|crystals]] were scrambling the [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]]. Its here that Nym would forge an alliance with Sixxa in his fight against the Trade Federation.
